# Major entities and relationships

1. Asset and Property hierarchy
   *   Asset is the core abstract real-estate entity and parent for concrete assets.
   *   Property and Portfolio derive from Asset.
   *   An Asset has many Activities and many Tenancies.
   *   A Property has one Address and can have many Offers.
   *   A Portfolio has many Properties.
1. Activity (marketing/listing lifecycle) and Requirement (client demand)
   *   Activity belongs to one Asset and has many Offers.
   *   Requirement has many Offers.
   *   Activity and Requirement are linked many-to-many via Match.
   *   Both Activity and Requirement can each have many Tenancies.
   *   Both have negotiators, departments, notes, attachments, and parties.
1. Offer and Tenancy (transaction progression)
   *   Offer can reference Activity, Requirement, and Property.
   *   Tenancy references one Asset and may reference Activity and Requirement.
   *   Tenancy has many TenancyParty records (tenant/landlord/agent roles).
   *   Tenancy has self-references (HeadLease and SubLeases, plus OriginalTenancy lineage).
1. Contact, Company, Relationship, and Address
   *   Contact and Company are linked via CompanyContact (many-to-many with attributes like job title).
   *   Contact has many ContactAddress records; Company has many CompanyAddress records.
   *   Contact-to-contact associations are represented by ContactRelationship, which points to a Relationship record (typed links).
   *   Referral is contact-led and can be associated to Activity, Requirement, and Instruction.
1. User, Business, Department (operating structure)
   *   User belongs to one Business and one Department (plus additional departments/teams/roles).
   *   Activity, Requirement, Tenancy, Instruction, etc. reference users as negotiators/owners.

## Illustration (ER-style overview)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR  
Asset -->|1.._| Activity  
Asset -->|1.._| Tenancy  
Asset -->|is-a| Property  
Asset -->|is-a| Portfolio  
Portfolio -->|1..*| Property  
Property -->|1| Address
Activity -->|0.._| Offer  
Requirement -->|0.._| Offer  
Offer -->|0..1| Property
Activity -->|0..* via Match| Requirement  
Match -->|1| Activity  
Match -->|1| Requirement
Tenancy -->|0..1| Activity  
Tenancy -->|0..1| Requirement  
Tenancy -->|1| Asset  
Tenancy -->|1..*| TenancyParty  
Tenancy -->|0..1 head lease| Tenancy
Contact -->|0.._| ContactAddress  
Company -->|0.._| CompanyAddress  
Contact -->|0..* via CompanyContact| Company  
Contact -->|0..* via ContactRelationship| Relationship
User -->|many| Activity  
User -->|many| Requirement  
User -->|many| Tenancy  
User -->|1| Business  
User -->|1| Department
```
